NO APPEARANCES. THE TENTATIVE RULING WAS ADOPTED. PLAINTIFF PORTS SEAFOOD, INC., A CORPORATION's Application For Writ Of Attachment is granted in the amount of $8,133. No opposition has been filed. The undertaking is set in the amount of $10,000. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.
